Format a Trace as OTLP JSON

Source: R/otlp.R
otlp_format_trace.Rd

Pure function that converts a trace list (from trace$to_list()) into the OTLP JSON structure expected by OpenTelemetry collectors.

Usage

otlp_format_trace(trace_list, service_name = "r-agent")

Arguments

trace_list

A list produced by Trace$to_list().

service_name

Service name for the OTLP resource (default "r-agent").

Value

A named list matching the OTLP ExportTraceServiceRequest JSON structure.

Examples

tr <- Trace$new("format-demo")
tr$start()
s <- Span$new("step", type = "tool")
s$start()
s$end()
tr$add_span(s)
tr$end()
otlp <- otlp_format_trace(tr$to_list())
str(otlp, max.level = 3)
#> List of 1
#>  $ resourceSpans:List of 1
#>   ..$ :List of 2
#>   .. ..$ resource  :List of 1
#>   .. ..$ scopeSpans:List of 1
